scripts.build: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm --filter @stagecut/gallery run build
scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter @stagecut/core run build && pnpm --filter @stagecut/react-player run build && pnpm --filter @stagecut/devtools run build
scripts.dev: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm --filter @stagecut/gallery run dev
scripts.gallery:render: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm --filter @stagecut/gallery run render
scripts.pack:check: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm size:check && pnpm --filter @stagecut/core exec publint && pnpm --filter @stagecut/react-player exec publint && pnpm --filter @stagecut/devtools exec publint && pnpm --filter @stagecut/core exec attw --pack . && pnpm --filter @stagecut/react-player exec attw --pack . && pnpm --filter @stagecut/devtools exec attw --pack .
scripts.test: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm --filter @stagecut/core run test && pnpm --filter @stagecut/react-player run test && pnpm --filter @stagecut/devtools run test
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm --filter @stagecut/core run test:coverage && pnpm --filter @stagecut/react-player run test:coverage && pnpm --filter @stagecut/devtools run test:coverage
scripts.type-check: pnpm --filter @stagecut/core run type-check && pnpm --filter @stagecut/react-player run type-check && pnpm --filter @stagecut/devtools run type-check && pnpm --filter @stagecut/gallery run type-check
scripts.verify: pnpm lint && pnpm changeset:status && pnpm type-check && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm pack:check
